features: Abundant Quantity: the package comes with 24 pieces of blank wooden signs for crafts, measuring about 10 x 5.8 cm/ 3.9 x 2.2 inches, equipped with 24 pieces of white felt balls and 20 pieces of adhesive dots, ideal for decoration demands, adding the festive atmosphere and making your Easter parties memorable

Reliable material: our blank wooden easter egg bunny are made of wood with a smooth surface, not easy to deform or break, and delicate in appearances, you can store them for your crafts project use, with no burrs and smell, and they are suitable for long term use, bringing you fluent using experiences

Cute Easter Decoration: the wooden bunny cutout serves as the classic symbol on Easter, designed with blank surface, and you may paint, color some eggs, write some blessings, and decorate other ornaments, making them coordinate to festival, creating beautiful and precious memories, with an increase of some holiday cheer

DIY Craft: our wooden bunny cutout may become your fun craft supplies, and you can glue felt balls to bunny slices with adhesive dots, to create brisk and vivid bunny tails, then use ropes to pass through them, to hang on your desired places, inspiring your imagination to create your own designs

Wide applications: unfinished wood egg rabbit bunny is suitable for many occasions, such as Easter party decorations, holiday gift tags, DIY wooden ornaments and more, they are also ideal for hanging ornaments
